text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since the Osaka Hai.
Before we even have the time to catch our
breath, Satono Diamond is flying out the gates of
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Another Umamusume's stumble has forced
Satono Daimond to the outside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand she's taken third! The favorite to win,
Satono Diamond, is unable to meet those
expectations and takes third!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's waited so long for a shot at running in a G1
race. I can't blame her for feeling depressed...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This... This is exactly why the jinx is worth
breaking...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's held the Satono family back for so long. Were
it so easy to break, someone would have done so
ages ago.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The competition is stronger than normal, and I'm
at a disadvantage against them. But I knew all of
that already.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm here... Next time, I will fulfill my duty!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia... You're right. There's no point getting hung
up on stuff like this. That goes for me, too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect anything less from a member of
the Satono Group. True to her name, she really
has a heart as hardy as a diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I lost today, but I'm not going to let it stop me.
I'm going to keep working toward the Derby, so
please...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do your best in your next race, you two. That is
the best encouragement I can ask for.
choice_data_list: Right. Let's go for the win, Kitasan.
Right. Let's go for the win, Kitasan.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
For sure! My next race will come before yours, so
I promise to run with all my heart for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though they run in different races, they continue
to challenge and encourage each other upon their
parallel paths. Their spring has become even
more intense.
